_purpose: Reconciliation of the practice_manual_corrections queue count before the number is quoted anywhere (user directive 2026-07-09: 'reconcile the correction queue count before using 6 anywhere'). This file is the evidence artifact behind the QUEUE_ACCT invariant in scripts/check_data_invariants.py.
system_of_record: Supabase practice_manual_corrections (live-app writes land there; the SQLite table created by scrapers/migrate_practice_manual_corrections.py is a schema mirror that received only the offline edge-QA rows and is NOT authoritative)
why_anon_cannot_see_it: RLS is enabled with no anon policies (scrapers/migrate_practice_manual_corrections.py line 65). PostgREST anon reads return zero rows. Do NOT grant anon/public SELECT/INSERT to work around this — that was denied once on 2026-07-09; do not retry. Counts must come from a direct Postgres connection (SUPABASE_POOLER_URL).

jhv-edge-qa-20260709.note: edge-bucket QA seeds from commit b282308, ids 5-10, all created 2026-07-09T05:13:15Z

health_check.note: synthetic health-check row, id 2, created 2026-07-08T05:30:19Z, already adjudicated rejected

verdict.the_number_6: The previously-quoted '6' counts only the QUEUED edge-QA rows. It is correct ONLY with the qualifier 'queued'. The unqualified queue size is 7. Any surface or doc quoting this queue must say either '6 queued' or '7 total (6 queued + 1 rejected)'.

sqlite_mirror.note: Missing the health_check row because that row was written via the live app path, which does not touch SQLite. Expected asymmetry, not drift.

verdict.id_gaps: Live ids are 2,5,6,7,8,9,10 — ids 1,3,4 were consumed by IDENTITY on inserts that did not persist (rolled-back health checks). Postgres identity sequences are non-transactional; gaps do NOT indicate deleted rows and do not violate append-only.

queries_run: SELECT status, submitted_by, count(*) FROM practice_manual_corrections GROUP BY 1,2  -- live Supabase via SUPABASE_POOLER_URL
SELECT id, field_key, status, submitted_by, created_at FROM practice_manual_corrections ORDER BY id  -- live Supabase
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM practice_manual_corrections  -- local SQLite data/dental_pe_tracker.db

rules: total >= 7 (append-only floor as of 2026-07-09; re-base upward only, with a dated successor to this file)
invariant.ci_behavior: SKIPs in anon-only CI (RLS by design); PASS/FAIL when run locally with SUPABASE_POOLER_URL
